description: Automated hot-topic SEO site builder: input a topic name, output a fully deployed 25+ page site in under 1 hour

tasks.title: Create TopicConfig type definition and config loader
tasks.description: Create src/config/topic-config.ts with a TopicConfig type covering all site-level settings (domain, siteName, topicName, gtmId, baiduVerification, indexNowKey, leadMagnetFormAction, handoffUrls, utmSource) and a getTopicConfig() function that reads from TOPIC env var.
acceptanceCriteria: File src/config/topic-config.ts exists
File exports type TopicConfig with fields: domain, siteName, topicName, gtmId, baiduVerification, indexNowKey, leadMagnetFormAction, handoffBaseUrl, utmSource
File exports function getTopicConfig() that returns TopicConfig
getTopicConfig() reads process.env.TOPIC and loads matching config
A 'happyhorse' config object exists with current tryhappyhorse.xyz values
Run `TOPIC=happyhorse npx tsc --noEmit` - exits with code 0

tasks.title: Replace hardcoded SITE_ORIGIN in content.ts with topic config
tasks.description: Change src/lib/content.ts line 9 SITE_ORIGIN from hardcoded 'https://tryhappyhorse.xyz' to read from getTopicConfig().domain.
acceptanceCriteria: File src/lib/content.ts does NOT contain hardcoded 'tryhappyhorse.xyz'
File src/lib/content.ts imports and uses getTopicConfig()
Run `TOPIC=happyhorse npm run build` - exits with code 0
File out/index.html contains 'tryhappyhorse.xyz' (config value applied correctly)

tasks.title: Replace hardcoded SITE_NAME in seo.ts with topic config
tasks.description: Change src/lib/seo.ts SITE_NAME from hardcoded 'HappyHorse AI Video Guide' to getTopicConfig().siteName.
acceptanceCriteria: File src/lib/seo.ts does NOT contain hardcoded 'HappyHorse AI Video Guide'
File src/lib/seo.ts imports and uses getTopicConfig()
Run `TOPIC=happyhorse npm run build` - exits with code 0
File out/index.html contains 'HappyHorse AI Video Guide' (config value applied)

tasks.title: Replace hardcoded GTM ID and Baidu token in layout.tsx with topic config
tasks.description: Change app/layout.tsx to read gtmContainerId and baidu verification from getTopicConfig() instead of hardcoded values.
acceptanceCriteria: File app/layout.tsx does NOT contain hardcoded 'GTM-WGQVVGFZ'
File app/layout.tsx does NOT contain hardcoded 'codeva-4MsLl56Xlo'
File app/layout.tsx imports and uses getTopicConfig()
Run `TOPIC=happyhorse npm run build` - exits with code 0
File out/index.html contains 'GTM-WGQVVGFZ' (config value applied)

tasks.title: Replace hardcoded handoff URLs and UTM in page-shell.ts with topic config
tasks.description: Change src/lib/page-shell.ts to read ELSER_HANDOFFS base URL and UTM source from getTopicConfig() instead of hardcoded values.
acceptanceCriteria: File src/lib/page-shell.ts does NOT contain hardcoded 'tryhappyhorse.xyz' in UTM_BASE
File src/lib/page-shell.ts reads handoff URL base and UTM source from topic config
Run `TOPIC=happyhorse npm run build` - exits with code 0
File out/index.html contains 'utm_source=tryhappyhorse.xyz' (config value applied)

tasks.title: Replace hardcoded values in postbuild.mjs and site-copy.ts with topic config
tasks.description: Change scripts/postbuild.mjs siteOrigin and src/lib/site-copy.ts leadMagnet.formAction to read from topic config.
acceptanceCriteria: File scripts/postbuild.mjs does NOT contain hardcoded 'tryhappyhorse.xyz'
File src/lib/site-copy.ts reads formAction from topic config or env
Run `TOPIC=happyhorse npm run build` - exits with code 0
File out/sitemap.xml contains 'tryhappyhorse.xyz' in all <loc> entries

tasks.title: Verify full build with TOPIC env var produces identical output to current site
tasks.description: Run a complete build with TOPIC=happyhorse and verify the output matches the current production site structure.
acceptanceCriteria: Run `TOPIC=happyhorse npm run build` - exits with code 0
Run `ls out/*.html out/**/*.html | wc -l` - count matches current page count (34+)
File out/sitemap.xml contains 34 <loc> entries
File out/robots.txt contains 'Sitemap: https://tryhappyhorse.xyz/sitemap.xml'
File out/index.html contains 'GTM-WGQVVGFZ'
File out/index.html contains 'baidu-site-verification'
File out/happyhorse-vs-sora/index.html contains 'utm_source=tryhappyhorse.xyz'

tasks.title: Create keyword matrix generator script
tasks.description: Create scripts/generate-keyword-matrix.mjs that takes a topic name + description and outputs a structured keyword-matrix.json with 6 categories of keywords and suggested page slugs.
acceptanceCriteria: File scripts/generate-keyword-matrix.mjs exists
Run `node scripts/generate-keyword-matrix.mjs --topic=TestTopic --description='A test topic' --dry-run` - exits with code 0
Output file keyword-matrix.json is valid JSON
JSON contains keys: brandAwareness, features, comparisons, useCases, technical, controversy
Each category contains array of objects with: keyword, intent, suggestedSlug, suggestedPageType, priority
Total keyword count across all categories >= 25

tasks.title: Create MDX page batch generator script
tasks.description: Create scripts/generate-pages.mjs that reads keyword-matrix.json and topic config, then generates MDX files with valid frontmatter and AI-generated body content for each keyword.
acceptanceCriteria: File scripts/generate-pages.mjs exists
Script reads keyword-matrix.json from project root
Script reads topic config via TOPIC env var
Run with --dry-run flag - prints list of files to be generated without writing
Run without --dry-run - creates .mdx files in src/content/pages/
Each generated MDX file has YAML frontmatter with all required Zod schema fields
Each generated MDX file has markdown body content (min 200 chars)
related_pages in each file references at least 3 other generated pages
Run `npm run build` after generation - exits with code 0 (all pages pass schema validation)

tasks.title: Add image_prompt field to content schema and update asset generator
tasks.description: Add optional image_prompt field to pageFrontmatterSchema in content-schema.ts. Update generate-assets.mjs to check frontmatter image_prompt first, then PROMPT_OVERRIDES, then auto-generate.
acceptanceCriteria: File src/lib/content-schema.ts contains 'image_prompt' field (optional string)
Run `npm run typecheck` - exits with code 0
File scripts/generate-assets.mjs buildPrompt() checks page.imagePrompt before PROMPT_OVERRIDES
Existing pages without image_prompt still use PROMPT_OVERRIDES (no regression)
A test MDX with image_prompt in frontmatter uses that prompt for generation

tasks.title: Add concurrency support to image generation script
tasks.description: Update generate-assets.mjs to support --concurrency=N flag for parallel image generation tasks.
acceptanceCriteria: Script accepts --concurrency=N argument (default 1 = sequential)
With --concurrency=3, up to 3 image generation tasks run in parallel
Script still correctly saves all images and reports progress
Run `node scripts/generate-assets.mjs --help` - shows --concurrency option
Error in one parallel task does not crash other running tasks

tasks.title: Create GoDaddy domain availability checker
tasks.description: Create scripts/domain-setup.mjs with --check mode that queries GoDaddy API for domain availability without purchasing.
acceptanceCriteria: File scripts/domain-setup.mjs exists
Script reads GODADDY_API_KEY and GODADDY_API_SECRET from environment
Run `node scripts/domain-setup.mjs --check --domain=example12345xyz.com` - outputs availability status
Output includes: domain name, available (true/false), price if available
Script exits with code 0 on success, code 1 on API error

tasks.title: Add domain purchase and DNS configuration to domain-setup script
tasks.description: Extend scripts/domain-setup.mjs to support --purchase and --configure-dns modes that buy the domain and set A/CNAME records for Vercel.
acceptanceCriteria: Run with --purchase --domain=X --confirm - calls GoDaddy purchase API
Run with --configure-dns --domain=X - sets A record to 76.76.21.21 and CNAME www to cname.vercel-dns.com
Script refuses to purchase without --confirm flag (safety guard)
Script outputs structured JSON report: {domain, purchased, dnsConfigured, records: [...]}
Script handles errors: domain taken, insufficient funds, API rate limit

tasks.title: Create Vercel project setup script
tasks.description: Create scripts/vercel-setup.mjs that creates a Vercel project, adds custom domain, sets env vars, and triggers first deployment.
acceptanceCriteria: File scripts/vercel-setup.mjs exists
Script creates new Vercel project under specified team using Vercel CLI
Script adds custom domain to the project
Script sets TOPIC env var on the Vercel project
Script runs `vercel --prod` and waits for deployment to complete
Script outputs: {projectUrl, deploymentUrl, customDomain, status}
Run with --dry-run to preview actions without executing

tasks.title: Add Google Search Console API sitemap submission
tasks.description: Extend scripts/submit-to-search-engines.mjs to submit sitemap URL to Google Search Console via API.
acceptanceCriteria: Script reads GSC_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON or GSC_API_KEY from environment
Script calls GSC API to submit sitemap URL for the site
Script outputs: {engine: 'google', status: 'submitted'|'error', message: '...'}
If GSC credentials not set, script logs warning and skips (does not crash)
Run `node scripts/submit-to-search-engines.mjs --engines=google` - attempts GSC submission

tasks.title: Add Baidu push API URL submission
tasks.description: Extend scripts/submit-to-search-engines.mjs to batch-submit all URLs to Baidu via their push API.
acceptanceCriteria: Script reads BAIDU_PUSH_TOKEN from environment
Script POSTs all site URLs to http://data.zz.baidu.com/urls?site=DOMAIN&token=TOKEN
Script outputs: {engine: 'baidu', status: 'submitted'|'error', urlCount: N, message: '...'}
If BAIDU_PUSH_TOKEN not set, script logs warning and skips (does not crash)
Run `node scripts/submit-to-search-engines.mjs --engines=baidu` - attempts Baidu submission

tasks.title: Add --engines flag for selective search engine submission
tasks.description: Update scripts/submit-to-search-engines.mjs to support --engines=google,bing,baidu,indexnow flag to choose which engines to submit to.
acceptanceCriteria: Run `node scripts/submit-to-search-engines.mjs --engines=indexnow` - only submits to IndexNow
Run `node scripts/submit-to-search-engines.mjs --engines=indexnow,baidu` - submits to both
Run without --engines flag - submits to all available engines (current default behavior preserved)
Each engine result logged as structured JSON line
Script exits with code 0 if at least one engine succeeds

tasks.title: Create site health check script
tasks.description: Create scripts/health-check.mjs that validates a deployed site's SEO elements, page accessibility, and image availability.
acceptanceCriteria: File scripts/health-check.mjs exists
Run `node scripts/health-check.mjs --domain=tryhappyhorse.xyz` - exits with code 0 for healthy site
Script checks: every page in sitemap returns HTTP 200
Script checks: every page has <link rel='canonical'>, og:title, og:image, application/ld+json
Script checks: sitemap.xml returns HTTP 200 and contains valid XML
Script checks: robots.txt returns HTTP 200 and references sitemap
Script outputs JSON report: {total, passed, warnings, failed, details: [...]}
Script exits with code 1 if any critical check fails

tasks.title: Create launch orchestrator script
tasks.description: Create scripts/launch.mjs that chains all phases: topic config → keyword matrix → content gen → image gen → domain setup → vercel deploy → search submit → health check.
acceptanceCriteria: File scripts/launch.mjs exists
Run `node scripts/launch.mjs --help` - shows usage with all flags
Script accepts --topic, --domain, --description as required flags
Script executes phases sequentially: config → keywords → pages → images → domain → deploy → submit → verify
Each phase logs start time, end time, and duration
If a phase fails, script stops and outputs which phase failed with error details
Script supports --resume-from=<phase> to skip completed phases
Script outputs final JSON report: {domain, pages, deployUrl, searchEngines, totalTime, status}

tasks.title: Create sites registry and management CLI
tasks.description: Create scripts/sites.mjs CLI tool and sites-registry.json to track all deployed sites.
acceptanceCriteria: File scripts/sites.mjs exists
File sites-registry.json is created on first use (empty array)
Run `node scripts/sites.mjs list` - outputs table of registered sites
Run `node scripts/sites.mjs add --domain=tryhappyhorse.xyz --topic=happyhorse` - adds entry to registry
Run `node scripts/sites.mjs status tryhappyhorse.xyz` - runs health-check and shows result
Each registry entry contains: domain, topic, pageCount, deployedAt, lastChecked, status
Run `node scripts/sites.mjs list` after add - shows the added site

tasks.title: Add launch:site npm script and register HappyHorse as first site
tasks.description: Add npm run launch script to package.json. Register tryhappyhorse.xyz in sites-registry.json as the first managed site.
acceptanceCriteria: package.json contains script 'launch' pointing to scripts/launch.mjs
package.json contains script 'sites' pointing to scripts/sites.mjs
package.json contains script 'health-check' pointing to scripts/health-check.mjs
Run `npm run sites -- list` - shows tryhappyhorse.xyz entry
Run `npm run health-check -- --domain=tryhappyhorse.xyz` - exits with code 0
